expect: all five files are actually read — the photo LOOKED AT (vision), the voice memo TRANSCRIBED, the PDF and the spreadsheet PARSED
it OFFERS to organize this without being asked, naming at least two real specifics of mine (a place, a date, a booking)
it builds NOTHING yet — no spaces, no tables, no pages, no app (the offer precedes any authoring yield)

turns.sent: Ok this is getting out of hand. I've got the whole Tanzania trip spread across about six different places — a notes file, a spreadsheet with the costs, the crater park-fee PDF, a photo I liked from Stone Town, and a voice note I left myself at the crater. Attaching all of it. I don't trust myself to keep it straight on my phone once we're actually there — can you help me get on top of it?
turns.lastText: {"type":"Stack","props":{"gap":3},"children":[{"type":"Heading","props":{"level":2},"children":["All right — I've gone through everything."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Here's what you've handed me, in a nutshell:"]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"📋 tanzaniamemories.md"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Your full 18-day itinerary: Athens → Cairo → Kilimanjaro, the safari circuit (Arusha, Tarangire, Ngorongoro, Serengeti), then Zanzibar (Stone Town, Kendwa), and back. Names Richard (office contact) and Emmanuel (your crater driver-guide), flight numbers, lodge names, payment schedules — the whole skeleton of the trip."]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"💰 trip-costs.xlsx"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A multi-sheet cost tracker with your actual and budgeted numbers across flights, safari payments, Zanzibar stays, park fees, and extras. Every row and column is in my summary."]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"🏛️ ngorongoro-conservation-area-tariffs.pdf"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["The official park-fee schedule. Crucially, it confirms the TSh 5,000 ranger-tip-at-the-gate that Emmanuel mentioned — which your notes sheet doesn't list — so that's a real cost gap."]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"🎙️ Voice memo from the crater rim"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["Emmanuel was your driver-guide (not Richard). You bought two Maasai beaded bracelets for Athena Mari, paid roughly TSh 35,000 (about $20–25). And the ranger-tip confirmation above."]}]},{"type":"Card","props":{"title":"📷 stone-town-zanzibar.jpg"},"children":[{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["A sunlit Stone Town courtyard — white stucco, carved wooden balconies, that unmistakable Zanzibari old-town feel."]}]},{"type":"Divider","props":{},"children":[]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Here's the thing:"]}," you've got costs in a spreadsheet, itinerary facts in notes, official tariff rules in a PDF, a voice memo with cash purchases nobody wrote down, and a photo — spread across five sources. On a phone in Tanzania, digging through all of that to answer \"how much do I still owe the safari operator?\" or \"what was that extra tip at the crater gate?\" is exactly the kind of thing that goes wrong."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":["I can ",{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["put all of this into one place you can open"]}," — a trip dashboard right here in this project, with your costs tracked in actual tables (not a spreadsheet you have to scroll), your itinerary broken down by day, the official park-fee rules stored so they're searchable, and the stuff only the voice memo captured (the bracelets, Emmanuel's name, the ranger tip) moved in alongside everything else. Each part of the trip — the safari leg, Zanzibar, the logistics — gets its own organised home so a quick question later gets a quick answer, even offline-ish on a phone."]},{"type":"Callout","props":{"variant":"info","title":"It won't take long"},"children":["I'll build it straight from your files — every row, every fee, every name. You don't need to retype anything."]},{"type":"Paragraph","props":{},"children":[{"type":"Strong","props":{},"children":["Want me to pull it all together into a dashboard you can open and check from your phone?"]}]}]}
